<!DOCTYPE html>

import { createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";

mismatches.expected: architecture route map marks most routes public/unguarded
mismatches.actual: App.tsx wraps most app routes in Guard
Guard only checks allowlisted pathname via isAllowedPath
GET /dashboard returns app html without auth token/session validation

mismatches.expected: mounted endpoints reachable with deterministic responses
mismatches.actual: 47/236 GET probes returned 500 and 4 timed out in no-DB runtime

risks.statement: path-based allowlist guard enables rendering internal pages without identity verification
missing DATABASE_URL causes startup/background and request-path failures; not all endpoints degrade gracefully
overlapping mounts increase ambiguity in canonical endpoint ownership
